metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_958
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig 3: Contactin-5 / NB-2 in cultured hippocampal neurons co-localized with presynaptic synapsin.
Fig 4: Synaptosomal fractions of P15 mouse cereral cortices analyzed by western blotting showed strong expression of contactin-5 / NB-2 in a fraction containing both presynaptic Kv1.2 and postsynaptic PSD95, and in a fraction containing only presynaptic Kv1.2

12/10/2017 Pim
- Based on the known lipid anchor of the protein, the "anchored component of ... membrane" term was chosen.. Experimental description: "C57BL/6J mice were housed in a specific pathogen-free facility kept under optimal hygiene conditions at Nagaoka University of Technology."
